research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.
note: Triggers confidence_tier_overclaim: confidence_tier = A claimed but distinct_models_count = 1. Tier A requires at least 3 independent model predictions (Boltz-2, Chemprop, GNINA minimum). Single-model prediction cannot justify Tier A; must be downgraded to C.
